description_long: This is a large, elegant two-story house with a symmetrical layout and Mediterranean architectural influences. The exterior is finished in a light, off-white color, featuring arched windows and doors, and a flat roof with subtle parapet detailing. The front of the house is accentuated by a central entryway flanked by columns and a paved pathway leading to a rectangular pool or water feature. The property is surrounded by manicured lawns, minimalistic landscaping with tall, slender trees, and paved walkways. The rear of the house includes a covered patio area and additional outdoor seating, while the side reveals a driveway leading to a secondary entrance. The overall design emphasizes balance, openness, and refined simplicity.
description: A grand, two-story Mediterranean-style house with arched windows, a central entryway, and manicured lawns. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical features and elegant landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central pool, symmetrical facade, and flanking trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the secondary entrance, driveway, and a fountain feature in the garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entry, covered patio, and additional landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing more of the patio area, outdoor seating, and side garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with columns, paved steps, and a formal approach flanked by landscaping.
